## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly checkpoint on automation projects and progress between Sam Lee (Deepgram) and Marcel Santilli (FWD Digital).](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New automation for generating personas expanded to include "contact sales" leads, increasing output to hundreds per week](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Sam is developing a new sequences custom object in Salesforce for more scalable and trackable sequence enrollment](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Marcel suggested storing data in a vector database for more efficient querying as data volume grows](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Discussed improving the auto-recap workflow using 01 Preview AI for higher quality outputs and longer responses](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)

## Topics

### Persona Generation Automation

  - [Expanded to include "contact sales" leads, generating personas for hundreds of people per week](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Using custom objects in Salesforce: "orchestrator" attached to leads/contacts, with "persona" as a child object](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Storing detailed dossiers and information on leads/contacts](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Sequence Enrollment Automation

  - [Created a sequences custom object in Salesforce](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Set up connector between N8N and Salesforce for data lookup](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Next step: AI to read through activity tables for sequence selection](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Using N8N for easier connection to Outreach (built by Bill)](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

### Auto-Recap Workflow Improvement

  - [Marcel shared a template using 01 Preview AI for higher quality outputs](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [Includes sections: quick recap, key points, resources, and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Suggested improvements:](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Create brand guidelines and style guides for consistent output](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Use workspace variables for seller information to avoid repeated research](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Replace LinkedIn member data scraping with People Data Labs (more reliable)](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
      - [Implement website scraping and caching for prospect information](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [Develop a system to update and maintain fact sheets on prospects and sellers](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Data Storage and Retrieval

  - [Discussed potential use of vector database for efficient data querying](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Suggested creating synthesized information from previous calls to avoid processing full transcripts each time](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Considered Slack as a delivery method for AEs to receive daily call recaps](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sam to adapt the auto-recap template with existing Deepgram automation elements (website scraping, rep-preferred style)](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Marcel to import and further refine the auto-recap workflow](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Aim to have a demo-ready version for the GTM kickoff meeting on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Explore options for sending recap information to AEs via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Continue developing the fact sheet system for maintaining updated prospect and seller information](https://fathom.video/share/-KAyKe9PUFs8Dtxn7X9nzWRwDzSLiH3d?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
